推荐场景: 公开讲座现场｜综合定义、背景、例子、比较、结论
60秒任务: 「演讲 Boss」：定义/背景/例子/结论；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 定义｜结构化说明｜例证｜比较｜结论｜笔记抓取
场景族: 课堂｜研讨室｜讲座｜访谈｜白板说明
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let me outline the argument.（梳理论点）
The speaker’s main point seems to be ___.（抓主旨）
The concept is defined as ___.（抓定义）
The background helps explain ___.（连接背景）
The example supports the idea that ___.（例证作用）
The comparison shows a trade-off between ___ and ___.（比较权衡）
The conclusion is reasonable, but it needs more evidence.（评价结论）
I’m not sure the example fully supports the claim.（质疑论证）
Which part should we write down?（笔记选择）
The lecturer is moving from background to examples.（识别结构转换）
Can you clarify the difference between ___ and ___?（提问澄清）
So the structure is definition, background, example, comparison, conclusion.（结构复述）
The key evidence is ___.（抓证据）
The limitation is that ___.（抓限制）
The final implication is ___.（理解含义）
Let’s turn these notes into a short summary.（笔记转总结）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: argument, concept, background, example, comparison, conclusion
Verbs: define, outline, support, compare, conclude, clarify
Adjectives: reasonable, limited, convincing, unclear, relevant, structured
Structure: definition, background, example, comparison, conclusion, Q&A
Chunks: main point, key evidence, fully supports the claim, short summary, trade-off between, final implication
